name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/week tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/week, frequent mismatches cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of sales orders and shipping confirmations.
problem_solved: Frequent mismatches between sales orders and shipping confirmations.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Frequent mismatches between sales orders and shipping confirmations.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/week, frequent mismatches cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of sales orders and shipping confirmations.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual reconciliation of sales orders and shipping confirmations.

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/week, frequent mismatches cause late orders. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of sales orders and shipping confirmations.
